text.title: Risk Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping the input shape to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the candidate risk have an observable trigger AND a named owner?

conclusion.verdict: reject row; force trigger + owner before accepting

branch.question: Do the P and I scores carry source citations?

conclusion.verdict: reject scores; require one-line rationale citing source artefact

branch.question: Are reserves modelled per-risk or as aggregate contingency?

conclusion.verdict: reject per-risk reserves; sum EMV into single contingency line

branch.question: Has the register been reviewed within 14 days?

conclusion.verdict: flag stale; trigger weekly review cycle

branch.question: Is any closed row missing outcome label or being deleted?

text.example: trigger_set=true, owner_set=true, rationale_present=true, per_risk_reserve=false, days_since_review=3, deletion_attempted=false → accept register.
